title: User Portfolio and Preferences Log (2025-10-10)
outcome: Full portfolio positions, allocations, supporting analytics, and detailed user preferences recorded. User: 25 years old, high risk tolerance, $5M net worth. Preferences: Lower beta, lower correlation, higher risk-adjusted returns, higher alpha potential.

title: Optimized Portfolio Implementation (2025-10-10)
outcome: Optimized portfolio defined and rationale recorded. Retained core Sharpe/alpha leaders (APP, AVGO, PLTR, NRG, NVDA, BSX, SGDM, SLVR, GREK, NLR). Added AAPL, KLAC, LRCX, GDDY, VRSK, LII, FAST, UI, JXI to improve diversity, lower beta/correlation, and support alpha resilience. Allocation shifts keep concentration below 30% in top 3, effective sector/industry de-clustering, and global/defensive exposures improved. Ready for analytics and iterative enhancement.
